name: ccbot-discord-bridge
description: Discord voice bridge for the auto-injector: talk to manager terminal 999 from a Discord voice channel, hear its TTS replies back.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/ttsPoller.js && node --check src/audioPlayer.js && node --check src/voiceReceive.js && node --check src/transcribe.js && node --check src/controlApi.js && node --check src/dave.js && node --check src/log.js && node --check src/wav.js && node --check src/doctor.js && node --check config.js

comment: VERSION PINS ARE LOAD-BEARING: @discordjs/voice MUST be >=0.19.2 — that release (PR #11449) fixes the DAVE voice-RECEIVE bug (RFC3550 padding); 0.19.0/0.19.1 capture broken audio under mandatory DAVE E2EE. @snazzah/davey auto-installs as a hard dep of voice; pinned here for clarity.
